steps.title: Find the rate per second
steps.content:
The faucet adds $0.08$ milliliter every $8$ seconds, so divide by $8$ to get the rate per second.
$$\frac{0.08}{8}=0.01$$

steps.title: Use the starting amount
steps.content:
The container starts with $18$ milliliters. After $t$ seconds, the added amount is $0.01t$, so the total volume is represented by this equation.
$$v=0.01t+18$$
The answer is C.
